signer.signingprofile.PlatformId.Docs: The ID of a platform that is available for use by a signing profile.

signer.signingprofile.SignatureValidityP.Docs: The validity period override for any signature generated using this signing profile. If unspecified, the default is 135 months.

signer.signingprofile.Tags.Docs: A list of tags associated with the signing profile.
